description: Compact public loading policies. Prefer JSON assets and resolved context records before Markdown.
tool_contract_note: All `node tools/apexctl.mjs ...` commands are package-root relative: run them from the packaged skill root, or invoke that script by explicit path.

open_order: the temp-runtime `context-resolution.json` report under `APEXLANG_OUTPUT_ROOT`, when present

policies.intent: create app from FR and model

post_check_import_choice.prompt: Default to checking APEXlang code only. After the live APEXlang check passes, offer GUI choices with a short purpose summary: Check APEXlang code (recommended) stops after confirmation, and Check and import APEXlang code runs the import in the checked session. If GUI choices are unavailable, stop after checking the code and report import as a follow-up.
